AMENDED DECLARATION OF PROPERTY MANAGER GEORGE JOHNSON IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF.

JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; REPORTER: ERIC THRONE; CLERK: GARTH SAYERS; COUNSEL AND PARTIES PRESENT; HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S EX-PARTE MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. WITNESS SWORN & EXAMINED. EVIDENCE MARKED, MOVED, AND RECEIVED. (EXHIBITS ORDERED RETURNED AT END OF HEARING) ORDER DEFT. PAY $1,125.00 BACK RENT BY 1/26/01 AT 5:00 OR FORFEIT. ALSO DEFT. PAY PLTF $200 ATTORNEY FEES WITHIN THRITY DAYS. JANUARY RENT MUST ALSO BE PAID IN ADDITION. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE ACCURATE ACCOUNTING OF ARREARS IN FURTURE.
ORDER FOR PAYMENT OF MONIES DUE UNDER STIPULATION AND OTHER RELIEF - GRANTED - JUDGE JAMES MCBRIDE. SEE ORDER FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CURRY, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 935 O'FARRELL STREET, #1, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $3,898.25 RENT, $200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,098.25, LEASE FORFEITED
